label: Pip cut — smile EQ
source: Audacity-cut + ffmpeg smile EQ + loudnorm -18 LUFS
description: Aggressive: highpass 70 Hz, wide -3 dB scoop centered at 600 Hz (Q=2.5), wide +3 dB plateau at 5.5 kHz, +1.5 dB at 12 kHz. Approximates the Audacity curve you drew. Maximum 'dumpf' removal — risk of telephone-y sound.
